---
output:
  html_document:
    css: "W:\\RDA Team\\R\\cc_brandguide.css"
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE
)

## The following document outputs a visual for the altadena_housing_before_and_after.html 

#### Setting Up ####

library(usethis)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(htmltools) 
library(htmlwidgets)
library(gtExtras)
library(gt)
library(sf)
library(scales)
library(leaflet)
library(rmapshaper)

options(scipen=999)

source("W:\\RDA Team\\R\\credentials_source.R")

con <- connect_to_db("altadena_recovery_rebuild")

## COLORS ##
orange <- "#F25922"
peridot <- "#CEEA01"
lavender <- "#CEC4E2"
meteorite <- "#3A207D"
ccblue <- "#0860BC"

black <- "#000000"
alabaster<-"#FBFBFB"
gainsboro <- "#DEDEDE"
```

```{r}
# Eaton Fire damaged properties
# residential parcel shapes
parcels <- st_read(con, query="SELECT * FROM data.rel_assessor_altadena_parcels_jan2025", geom="geom") %>% st_transform(4326)
res_data <- st_read(con, query="SELECT * FROM data.rel_assessor_residential_jan2025")
damage <- st_read(con, query="SELECT * FROM data.rel_assessor_damage_level")
# join parcel shapes to residential data
parcels <- parcels %>% left_join(res_data, by="ain") %>% left_join(damage, by="ain")
# make one layer for all residential - use this to visualize all properties
parcels_res_damaged <- parcels %>% filter(residential==TRUE & total_units>0 & damage_category=="Significant Damage") 

# east and west altadena boundaries --
west <- st_read(con, query="SELECT * FROM data.west_altadena_3310", geom="geom") %>% st_transform(4326) %>% ms_simplify()
east <- st_read(con, query="SELECT * FROM data.east_altadena_3310", geom="geom") %>% st_transform(4326) %>%  ms_simplify()

df_lead <- st_read(con, query="Select * from data.lacdph_lead_results_grid_2025", geom="geom") %>% 
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  mutate(hi_lead_flag = ifelse(lead_geometric_mean > 80, TRUE, FALSE))

#NOTE: taking time to transform even after filtering
df_zoning_lac <- st_read(con, query = "Select * FROM data.lac_unincorporated_zoning_3310 WHERE plng_area = 'East San Gabriel Valley' OR plng_area = 'West San Gabriel Valley'", geom="geom") %>% st_transform(4326)

# df_zoning_pas <- st_read(con, query = "Select * FROM data.cityofpasadena_zoning_3310", geom="geom") %>% st_transform(4326)

df_local_fhsz <- st_read(con, query="Select * from data.eaton_local_fhsz_4326 WHERE fhsz_descr != 'NonWildland'", geom="geom")

df_state_fhsz <- st_read(con, query="Select * from data.eaton_state_fhsz_4326", geom="geom") 

eaton_fire <- st_read(con, query="SELECT * FROM data.eaton_fire_prmtr_3310", geom="geom") %>% st_transform(4326) %>%  ms_simplify()

popup_damage <-  paste0(
      "AIN: ", parcels_res_damaged$ain, "</br>",
      "Residential Type: ",  parcels_res_damaged$res_type, "</br>",
      "Average Lead Level Measured in mg/kg: ", df_lead$lead_geometric_mean, "</br>",
      "State Fire Hazard Zone Level: ", df_state_fhsz$fhsz_descr, "</br>",
      "Local Fire Hazard Zone Level: ", df_local_fhsz$fhsz_descr, "</br>",
      "LA County Unincorporated Zoning Description: ", df_zoning_lac$z_desc
      )
colorpal_local_fhsz <- colorFactor(palette = "YlOrRd", domain = df_local_fhsz$fhsz_descr)
colorpal_state_fhsz <- colorFactor(palette = "YlOrRd", domain = df_state_fhsz$fhsz_descr)

```


```{r}
leaflet () %>%
addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
     setView(-118.131127, 34.194432, zoom = 13) %>%
  #Damaged/Destroyed Properties
  addCircleMarkers(data=parcels_res_damaged,
                   radius = 2,
                   color = "white",
                   weight = .5,
                   fillColor = orange,
                   fillOpacity= 0.6,
                   popup = ~popup_damage,
                   group="Significantly Damaged Parcels after Eaton Fire") %>%
  #Eaton Fire Perimeter
  addPolygons(data=eaton_fire,
              fillColor="white",
              fillOpacity=0,
              color="black",
              weight=2.5,
              opacity=1,
              options=pathOptions(clickable=FALSE),
              group="Eaton Fire Perimeter") %>%
  #East Perimeter
  addPolygons(data=east,
              fillColor="white",
              fillOpacity=0,
              color=meteorite,
              weight=2.5,
              opacity=1,
              options=pathOptions(clickable=FALSE),
              group="East Altadena") %>%
  #West Perimeter
  addPolygons(data=west,
              fillColor="white",
              fillOpacity=0,
              color=ccblue,
              weight=2.5,
              opacity=1,
              options=pathOptions(clickable=FALSE),
              group="West Altadena") %>%
  #Lead Data 
  addPolygons(data=df_lead,
              fillColor = ~ifelse(hi_lead_flag, "red", "white"),
              fillOpacity=0,
              color= "gray",
              weight=.6,
              opacity=1,
              popup=~popup_damage,
              group="High Levels of Lead in Soil") %>% 
                addLegend(
                  position = "bottomleft",
                  colors = c("red", "white"),
                  labels = c("High Lead Level", "Normal Lead Level"),
                  group="High Levels of Lead in Soil",
                  title = "Lead Levels"
                ) %>%
  #Fire Hazard Zones 
  addPolygons(data=df_local_fhsz,
              fillColor=~colorpal_local_fhsz(fhsz_descr),
              fillOpacity=0.7,
              color="white",
              weight=1,
              popup=~fhsz_descr,
              group="Local Fire Hazard Zones") %>%
                addLegend(
                position = "bottomleft",
                pal = colorpal_local_fhsz,
                values =  df_local_fhsz$fhsz_descr,
                group="Local Fire Hazard Zones",
                title = "Hazard Level") %>%
  addPolygons(data=df_state_fhsz,
              fillColor=~colorpal_state_fhsz(fhsz_descr),
              fillOpacity=0.7,
              color="white",
              weight=1,
              popup=~fhsz_descr,
              group="State Fire Hazard Zones") %>%
  #Zoning 
  addPolygons(data=df_zoning_lac,
              fillColor="white",
              fillOpacity=0,
              color=lavender,
              weight=1,
              opacity=1,
              popup=~z_desc,
              group="Zoning") %>% 
  #Controling Layers
  addLayersControl(
          overlayGroups = c("Significantly Damaged Parcels after Eaton Fire", "High Levels of Lead in Soil","Local Fire Hazard Zones","State Fire Hazard Zones","Zoning","West Altadena","East Altadena","Eaton Fire Perimeter"),
        options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE,autoZIndex = TRUE))  %>%
  hideGroup(c("Eaton Fire Perimeter","High Levels of Lead in Soil","Local Fire Hazard Zones","State Fire Hazard Zones","Zoning"))

```


```{r}
dbDisconnect(con)
```
